Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce a Python dictionary for temporal profile of activities in a supply chain process The activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS We need pairs of activities that eventually follow each other in some trace not just directly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So for any ordered pair A B where A occurs before B in at least one execution we need to estimate average time and std dev

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But we do not have real data we need to provide plausible estimates

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Typically times in seconds Could be days hours etc Let us think typical supply chain supplier selection might take days order placement quick receive components weeks inspection days assembly days testing days packaging hours warehouse storage days to months distribution days after sales support months

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will use seconds for consistency But can use hours or days converted to seconds Let us assume times in seconds

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For example SS to OP average 1 day std dev 1 hour OP to RC average 2 weeks std dev 2 days RC to QI average 1 day std dev 4 hours QI to CA average 1 day std dev 6 hours CA to PT average 2 days std dev 1 day PT to PK average 1 day std dev 4 hours PK to WS average 4 hours std dev 1 hour WS to DT average 5 days std dev 1 day DT to AS average 30 days std dev 7 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now non direct pairs for instance SS to RC is SS to OP plus OP to RC similarly SS to QI SS to CA SS to PT and so on

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We need a representative subset of pairs Since it is a complex process we should include pairs that are not directly connected as well as direct The dictionary should have many entries

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Because the prompt says representative subset ensuring complexity we will choose many plausible pairs and keep only ordered pairs where the first activity precedes the second

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For cumulative averages the later pair timings are formed by summing the intermediate stage averages and estimating a plausible combined deviation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The temporal profile is for ordered pairs A B where A precedes B so reverse pairs are not needed
